name: @quertys/axoloth-behavior
description: Optional zero-dependency JavaScript behaviors for Axoloth Style.

scripts.test:syntax: node --check src/internal/collection.js && node --check src/internal/createDismissibleLayer.js && node --check src/accordion.js && node --check src/dialog.js && node --check src/drawer.js && node --check src/dropdown.js && node --check src/offcanvas.js && node --check src/tabs.js && node --check src/toast.js && node --check src/index.js
scripts.test: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:contract
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run check:api
